risk_title: Disruption in Implementation in Conflict-Affected Areas
risk_summary: Project implementation is experiencing disruptions in conflict-affected areas, affecting program delivery and beneficiary access to services.
evidence_quote: disruption in implementation in conflict-affected areas

risk_title: Account Opening Delays in Tigray Region Due to Coordination Challenges
risk_summary: Delays in finalizing account opening in 23 woredas in Tigray region attributed to limited coordination, accountability and collaboration among implementing entities, affecting beneficiary access to electronic payments.
evidence_quote: delays in finalizing account opening in the 23 woredas in Tigray region and other e-payment expansion woredas. These delays were attributed to submission of incomplete Know Your Customer (KYC) data; limited coordination, accountability and collaboration among implementing entities.

risk_title: Unexploded Ordnance Risk in Hotspot Woredas
risk_summary: Unexploded Ordnance (UXO) risks identified in hotspot woredas in Tigray and Amhara regions, requiring specialized awareness training and incident response protocols for public works implementation.
evidence_quote: training on Unexploded Ordnance risk awareness and ESIRT reporting was delivered to hotspot woredas in Tigray and Amhara

risk_title: Exclusion of PSNP Transitory Caseload from Humanitarian Response Planning
risk_summary: PSNP transitory caseload exclusion from the Humanitarian Response Plan creates vulnerability gaps during lean season (July-December), limiting partner coordination and targeting of PSNP beneficiaries requiring temporary assistance.
evidence_quote: The exclusion of PSNP transitory caseload from the Humanitarian Response Plan (HRP). While this approach may be justified during the January–June period each year as beneficiaries receive PSNP cash transfer, it becomes difficult for PSNP beneficiaries requiring temporary assistance to cope if they are excluded during lean season, from July to December.
